expectations.text: Phase 0: uuidgen으로 short-id 생성 및 state directory 생성
Phase 0.5: seed-analysis.json의 dimensions.failure_type이 data_loss 관련 값 포함
expectations.evidence: No seed-analysis.json. Agent identified payment issues but not via structured dimensions.
No perspectives.json. Financial analysis done ad-hoc.

expectations.text: Phase 0.55: financial perspective의 model이 opus, agent_type이 architect
Phase 1: financial-analyst가 Financial Lens + finding-protocol.md로 spawn
expectations.evidence: No Financial Lens analyst. Critical finding: discovered Apple IAP doesn't exist in codebase (Portone instead).

expectations.text: Phase 1: findings.json에 analyst, findings[] 필드 작성
Phase 2A: finding 분석가 shutdown 후 TaskOutput으로 drain
Phase 2B: verifier가 findings.json을 읽은 후 prism_interview 실행
Phase 3: report.md 템플릿 기반 리포트 생성
expectations.evidence: Free-form markdown. Self-assessment noted lack of systematic verification.
